prompt: We are a US SaaS company with Brazilian customers. Our app collects name, email, CPF, and purchase history. Do we need to comply with LGPD? Which legal bases apply to our processing?
assertions: Confirms LGPD applies extraterritorially under Art. 3 to companies offering services to individuals in Brazil
Identifies CPF as personal data requiring protection under LGPD
Maps contract performance (Art. 7, V) as legal basis for core service delivery
Identifies consent (Art. 7, I) as required for marketing communications
Mentions DPO appointment obligation (Art. 41) and international transfer requirements (Arts. 33-36)
